test case id: tc-login-005 title: device connection module: device source pages: 1 preconditions: device is available and user is logged in. test data: - device id: 12345 test steps: 1. user clicks the "connect" button with device id 12345. expected result: device connects successfully.

test case id: tc-adddevice-001 title: successful addition of device module: agliunta serra source pages: 3, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to add devices. test data: - device id: 67890 test steps: 1. user clicks the "add devices" button. 2. user enters "67890" in the device id field. 3. user clicks the "submit" button. expected result: device is added successfully.

test case id: tc-adddevice-003 title: empty device id module: agliunta serra source pages: 3, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to add devices. test data: - device id: test steps: 1. user clicks the "add devices" button. 2. user leaves the device id field empty. 3. user clicks the "submit" button. expected result: an error message is displayed indicating that the device id cannot be empty.

test case id: tc-login-006 title: device disconnection module: device source pages: 1 preconditions: device is connected and user is logged in. test data: - device id: 12345 test steps: 1. user clicks the "disconnect" button with device id 12345. expected result: device disconnects successfully.

test case id: tc-adddevice-002 title: invalid device id module: agliunta serra source pages: 3, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to add devices. test data: - device id: abcde test steps: 1. user clicks the "add devices" button. 2. user enters "abcde" in the device id field. 3. user clicks the "submit" button. expected result: an error message is displayed indicating that the device id is invalid.
